scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared-types && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.type-check: tsc --noEmit -w packages/shared-types && tsc --noEmit -w apps/api && tsc --noEmit -w apps/web
